summary: Changed unified position action pill labels from YES/NO to WIN/LOSE.
Added TP, SL, and Size stat boxes after Entry/Current/Confidence in buildUnifiedPositionCards().
Implemented sizeUsd computation exactly as specified.
Added command bar W% stat element with id cmd-winrate.
Bound cmd-winrate in renderState(s) from s?.r25?.win_rate using XX% or — formatting.
